_comment: Override file for cost.py --rates. Values are USD per million tokens. Entries MERGE over the built-in tables, so include only the models/keys you want to change or add. Keys match by longest model-id prefix. Anthropic cache rates derive from base input via _cache_multipliers (read 0.10, write_5m 1.25, write_1h 2.0). OpenAI entries use input/cached/output, with an optional 'lc' long-context tier {threshold,input,cached,output}.
